pr.title: Record: ParallelResiduals + MiniDepthRecurrence, 1.1063 BPB / 1.8679 nats, -0.0072 vs PR #1179, -0.0143 vs merged SOTA

output.summary: Parallel residual lanes plus delayed mini depth recurrence ride atop AR GPTQ/mixed quant to squeeze more depth from the stack.
techniques: parallel residual dual-lane routing from layer 7
mini depth recurrence on layers 4-5 with delayed start and untied MLPs
mixed quantization with autoregressive GPTQ calibration
